title: PARENTING SUPPORT - 211info
text: NORTHGATE CENTER PARENTING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support such as community cafes, the Casa Infantil Project, Strengthening Families Parenting Classes, advocacy, diapers, baby formula, and other baby items. 3850 Portland Road NE Suite 130 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday noon-6pm Email (503) 363-1895 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 363-1895 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment. Walk-ins may be accepted on a case-by-case basis. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The office is located on the first floor of the Northgate Center building. Enter the building through the glass door main entrance. Bus route #3. Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY WELLNESS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHGATE CENTER
